privileged_info_summary: The task is designed to test restoration of camera configurations in an Nx Witness VMS environment. All metadata claims have been verified: backup file path /home/ga/Documents/camera_backup.json, log file path /home/ga/Documents/restore_log.txt, and API base URL https://localhost:7001 are consistently used across all scripts. Scoring configuration values (name_match_points: 10, logical_id_match_points: 7, recording_enabled_points: 7, fps_match_points: 5, log_file_points: 8, change_detected_points: 5) are verified against the verifier implementation. The task uses synthetically generated data created by the setup script, not real camera data.
